class.name: JWTBuilder
class.brief_description: A fluent builder for constructing formatted JSON Web Tokens.

method.name: add_claim
method.description: Adds a custom key-value claim to the token's payload. Methods can be chained.

method.name: set_algorithm
method.description: Sets the algorithm (`alg`) in the token's header. Common values are `HS256` or `RS256`.

method.name: set_audience
method.description: Sets the audience (`aud`) claim in the payload indicating the intended recipients.

method.name: set_expiration
method.description: Sets the expiration time (`exp`) claim in the payload to the specified number of seconds from now.

method.name: set_issuer
method.description: Sets the issuer (`iss`) claim in the payload identifying the principal that issued the JWT.

method.name: set_jwt_id
method.description: Sets the JWT ID (`jti`) claim in the payload, which provides a unique identifier for the token.

method.name: set_subject
method.description: Sets the subject (`sub`) claim in the payload identifying the principal that is the subject of the JWT.

method.name: sign
method.description: Constructs and signs the JWT using the configured claims and header. Requires a String secret for HS256 or a CryptoKey for RS256.
